title: App schema: posts table (schema only)

task.description: Add posts table to app schema for completeness, matching SPEC columns, JSON defaults, status check, and FK delete rules. No API/UI yet; only ensure DB can store drafts and generated content safely.
acceptance_criteria: DB contains posts table with CHECK(status IN ('draft','generated')).
hashtags_ko_json and hashtags_en_json default to the literal string '[]' when omitted on insert.
FKs exist for user_id (ON DELETE CASCADE), place_id (ON DELETE RESTRICT), style_profile_id (ON DELETE RESTRICT).

definition_of_done: Schema applies cleanly on startup for existing and fresh DBs.
No runtime errors in schema init due to FK order.
db_schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS posts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, place_id INTEGER NOT NULL, style_profile_id INTEGER NOT NULL, title_ko TEXT NULL, content_ko TEXT NULL, hashtags_ko_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', title_en TEXT NULL, content_en TEXT NULL, hashtags_en_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('draft','generated')), generation_error TEXT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY(place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY(style_profile_id) REFERENCES style_profiles(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT);
